item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-07-05 - Today's Summary
[sudden_breakout] gvergnaud/ts-pattern (+3 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Local LLM / Inference Description: TS-Pattern brings exhaustive, type-safe pattern matching to TypeScript, enabling concise and readable branching on complex data structures with smart type inference. Why it matters: The repo shows a sudden breakout with an acceleration of 3 (high), gaining 4 stars in the last 24 hours and maintaining a 7-day average of 1.5 stars/day. With 15,022 total stars and only 166 forks, the star-to-fork ratio is extremely high, indicating broad interest. The recent commit within 7 days and the sudden acceleration suggest renewed attention, possibly from a viral post or community highlight. Developer insight: This signals a growing demand for functional programming patterns in TypeScript, especially for frontend state management. AI developers building type-safe agents or data pipelines can leverage TS-Pattern for robust branching logic. Risk: Medium

item.title: [sustained_hot] calesthio/OpenMontage (+1111 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1111，总 stars 32,971，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Panniantong/Agent-Reach (+1184 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1184，总 stars 50,447，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] alibaba/page-agent (+3069 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +3069，总 stars 22,911，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks (+734 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +734，前 3 日均值 241.7，加速度 3x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] headroomlabs-ai/headroom (+557 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +557，总 stars 56,458，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] JuliusBrussee/caveman (+2355 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Other AI Description: 🪨 why use many token when few token do trick — Claude Code skill that cuts 65% of tokens by talking like caveman Why it matters: Other AI 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +2355，前 3 日均值 1107.3，加速度 2.1x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low
